Title: Relates to the effectiveness of certain county-tribal detention agreements between the Oneida Indian Nation and Oneida county and Madison county
Summary: Relates to the effectiveness of certain county-tribal detention agreements between the Oneida Indian Nation and Oneida county and Madison county.
LawCode: Amd §§853 & 854, County L; amd §5, Chap 213 of 2024
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the county law, in relation to the effectiveness of certain county-tribal detention agreements; and to amend chapter 213 of the laws of 2024 amending the correction law relating to the use of certain county jails, in relation to the effectiveness thereof
